final:
module dac_controller (
    input [23:0] data_in,
    input enable,
    output reg [23:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (enable) begin
            data_out = data_in;
        end else begin
            data_out = 24'b0;
        end
    end
endmodule
